html:
Exclusive to:

Forget-Me-Lots are a Vegetable Food exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.

They can be harvested from a Forget-Me-Lots Plant. They are used to prepare Soothing Tea and Beefalo Treats in a Crock Pot. As Wendy, they can also be used to make Ghastly Experience.

Dried Forget-Me-Lots

Dried Forget-Me-Lots are made from drying Forget-Me-Lots on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Forget-Me-Lots Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Recipe

Filler cannot be Monster Food, Meats, Fish, Egg, Dairy, Inedible or Vegetable.

×3

×6 / 4 / 2

Trivia

  • The Forget-Me-Lots was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.

Gallery

  • Tea concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Exclusive to:
“Hm. I can't remember what I was going to say about those.”
–Wilson
“Some more dumb flowers.”
–Willow
“Pretty little flowers.”
–Wolfgang
“They are rather pretty for a weed.”
–Wendy
“PATHETIC FLOWERS”
–WX-78
“This strain can be used to brew a rather pleasant herbal tea.”
–Wickerbottom
“Funny what some folks will call a "weed". I think it looks nice!”
–Woodie
“Nothing but a common weed.”
–Maxwell
“I dö nöt trust them.”
–Wigfrid
“This one has pretty flowers.”
–Webber
“Hm, I don't recall ever seeing a flower like that before.”
–Warly
“Pretty friends”
–Wormwood
“I'm not one for flowers, especially when they crowd out my hard working crops!”
–Winona
“They seems to have a tinge of magic about them.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Is another flower.”
–Wurt
“I keep forgetting to look them up in my handbook.”
–Walter
“Have I seen those before?”
–Wanda
Forget-Me-Lots are a Vegetable Food exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.
They can be harvested from a Forget-Me-Lots Plant. They are used to prepare Soothing Tea and Beefalo Treats in a Crock Pot. As Wendy, they can also be used to make Ghastly Experience.

–Wickerbottom

–Woodie
“They're all shrivelled up.”
–Maxwell
“T'wöuld make a möst wörthy öffering tö the göds!”
–Wigfrid
“Did we pick these?”
–Webber
“A fine ingredient!”
–Warly
“Dry stuff”
–Wormwood
“These are nice and dry.”
–Winona
“I'd eyed it'd dried.”
–Wortox
“Dried bits not yummy.”
–Wurt
“Dried perfectly!”
–Walter
“Smells lovely.”
–Wanda
Dried Forget-Me-Lots are made from drying Forget-Me-Lots on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Forget-Me-Lots Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Tóm tắt

'''Forget-Me-Lots''' are a [[Vegetables|Vegetable]] [[Food]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''.

They can be harvested from a [[Weeds#Forget-Me-Lots|Forget-Me-Lots Plant]]. They are used to prepare [[Soothing Tea]] and [[Beefalo Treats]] in a [[Crock Pot]]. As Wendy, they can also be used to make [[Ghastly Experience]].

{{clear}}

'''Dried Forget-Me-Lots''' are made from drying Forget-Me-Lots on the [[Drying Rack/DST|Drying Rack]]. They can be used to make [[Forget-Me-Lots Tea]] at [[Pearl's Tea Shop]].
	
{{clear}}
